preview_defaults.message: Wishing you joy and laughter on your special day!
Thirty years of brilliance — here's to many more.
It's your birthday and the night is young.
May your day bloom as wildly as you do.
You are the sunshine of this day.
Wishing you joy, laughter and cake!
There aren't enough words to describe how special you are to me. Today is yours — every wonderful second of it.

preview_defaults.wish_text: Close your eyes, make a wish — it's already on its way to you.

templates.name: Legend of the Day Badge Template

preview_defaults.message: A premium birthday surprise just for you.

preview_defaults.personal_note: Every great story needs a protagonist. Yours is a masterpiece.

products.name: Confetti Birthday Card
products.description: A vibrant birthday card bursting with confetti, layered gradients, and a fully personalised message. Perfect for any age.
products.purchase_instructions: Add a recipient name, pick a card style and colour theme, then write your message. The card is delivered instantly to the birthday page.

products.name: Golden Milestone Card
products.description: An elegant, gold-foil card designed for milestone birthdays — 18th, 21st, 30th, 40th, 50th and beyond. Understated luxury in every detail.

fields.name: message
fields.label: Your message
fields.placeholder: Something meaningful for a milestone moment…

products.purchase_instructions: Enter the celebrant's name and milestone age. Choose a metal tone and engraving style. Your card is delivered instantly to their birthday page.

products.name: Neon Party Card
products.description: A dark, high-energy card with glowing neon text and a rave-inspired aesthetic. For the birthday where the night doesn't end.

fields.name: recipient_name
fields.label: Shout-out name
fields.placeholder: e.g. LET'S GOOO or Happy Birthday Jake

products.purchase_instructions: Write a bold shout-out, pick your neon colour and vibe. Lands instantly on their birthday page. Max energy only.

products.name: Classic Rose Bouquet
products.description: A lush, hand-tied rose bouquet delivered digitally — choose your rose colour, ribbon, and add a personal card note.

fields.name: message
fields.label: Card note
fields.placeholder: A short note to attach to the bouquet…

products.purchase_instructions: Choose your rose colour and arrangement style, add a card note, and it appears on the birthday page in seconds.

products.name: Wildflower Garden
products.description: A beautifully chaotic wildflower bouquet with earthy tones and botanical charm. For the birthday soul who blooms differently.

fields.name: dedication
fields.label: Dedication (shown at top)
fields.placeholder: e.g. For my favourite wild soul

products.purchase_instructions: Pick a palette and stem count, add a dedication and personal note. The wildflower arrangement is displayed on the birthday page instantly.

products.name: Sunflower Beam
products.description: Bright, joyful sunflowers radiating warmth and positivity. A bold gift for someone who lights up every room they walk into.
products.purchase_instructions: Write a sunny message, choose your display style and accent colour. The sunflower gift lights up their birthday page instantly.

products.name: Celebration Note
products.description: A spotlit animated message card for quick, joyful celebrations. Clean, modern, and impossible to miss.

fields.name: message
fields.label: Your celebration message
fields.placeholder: Short and punchy works best here…

products.purchase_instructions: Write your message, pick an animation, and choose a background. Best for short, punchy celebrations.

products.name: Heartfelt Letter
products.description: A beautifully animated letter card with a parchment aesthetic and a personal sign-off. For when you really mean every word.

fields.name: message
fields.label: Your letter
fields.placeholder: Take your time — every word counts here…

products.purchase_instructions: Write a genuine letter, choose paper and ink styles, and add a wax seal for extra charm. Perfect for someone who deserves more than a caption.

products.name: Starlight Wish
products.description: An ethereal, starfield message card with shimmering animations. Send a wish written in the stars — magical and unforgettable.

fields.name: wish_text
fields.label: Your wish
fields.placeholder: Make it poetic, make it count…

products.purchase_instructions: Write a wish, set the star density, and pick a constellation. The starfield animates when the recipient opens their gift.

products.name: Birthday Queen Badge
products.description: A shining badge that crowns the celebrant with a custom title and glam aesthetic. Perfect for the queen of the day.
products.purchase_instructions: Add a name and caption, choose a crown and colour. The badge drops instantly onto the birthday page for the world to see.

products.name: Birthday King Badge
products.description: A bold, regal badge built for kings. Commanding design with gold crowns and powerful typography — claim the throne for the day.

fields.name: message
fields.label: Royal decree
fields.placeholder: e.g. Ruler of this fine day

products.purchase_instructions: Crown him with a name and decree. Choose a crown style and colour — the badge appears on his birthday page immediately.

products.name: Legend of the Day Badge
products.description: An award-style badge for anyone who's earned legendary status. Gender-neutral, bold, and perfectly suited for milestone birthdays.
products.purchase_instructions: Name the legend, write their title and achievement. Pick a badge shape and colour theme. Displayed with full ceremony on their birthday page.

products.name: Birthday Highlight Video
products.description: An energetic video-style gift with a custom headline, message reel, and vibrant transitions. Show-stopping from the first frame.

fields.name: message
fields.label: Highlight message
fields.placeholder: A quick tribute shown across the reel…

products.purchase_instructions: Set a name and message, choose your style, mood, and transitions. The video preview card goes live on their birthday page immediately.

products.name: Cinematic Tribute
products.description: A premium film-grade tribute with a letterboxed cinematic look, grain texture, and a personal director's note. The most elevated gift on the platform.

fields.name: personal_note
fields.label: Tribute note
fields.placeholder: A few lines that will last a lifetime…

fields.name: director_credit
fields.label: Director's credit
fields.placeholder: e.g. Directed with love by Marcus

products.purchase_instructions: Title the film, write a tribute note, and add a director's credit. Set your grade and format for a truly cinematic gift that honours the person perfectly.
